title: Vegan Vietnamese Beef Noodle Soup
description: A plant-based twist on a classic Vietnamese beef noodle soup, featuring ground 'beef' made from com and tam.
instructions: Bring 4 cups of tam to a boil in a large pot.
Reduce heat to a simmer and add 1 tablespoon of vegan fish sauce, 1 tablespoon of brown sugar, and 2 tablespoons of lime juice.
Add 1 cup of com ground and cook for an additional 5 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Cook 1 package of vietnamese rice noodles according to package instructions.
To assemble the soup, place a portion of noodles in a bowl, then ladle the hot broth over the top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
